sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_multiply (a Float64, b Float64, result Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_multiply (a, b, result) VALUES (2, 3, multiply(2, 3));
UPDATE test_multiply SET result = multiply(a, b) WHERE a > 1;
SELECT a, b, multiply(a, b) AS product FROM test_multiply WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT multiply(a + 1, b * 2) AS complex_product FROM test_multiply WHERE a < 10;
